translations.name: 巴黎展开：法国国旗上的3D微缩城市景观
translations.content:
一条丝质绸带沿画布对角展开，在空中轻柔扭转。绸带的褶皱中隐藏着一座微缩雕刻的[CITY]城市，呈现为从织物纹理中浮现的3D浮雕。

绸带内部：[CITY]的地标、街道和天际线韵律，自然地沿着绸带的弧度流动，以微妙的深度层次呈现。

风格：织物写实与雕塑浮雕的融合。柔和的高光，触感般的褶皱，优雅的海报设计。

色彩基调：源自[COUNTRY]国旗的色彩，无缝融入织物色调之中。
视角与背景：俯视极简布局，米白色博物馆纸张纹理，强烈的负空间运用。

文字排版：标题：「[CITY] UNFOLDED」精致的衬线字体副标题，配有诗意的地理语言。

构图规则：所有建筑细节严格保持在绸带形状之内。超精细细节，HDR，画廊级品质，8K海报美学。
translations.nameEn: Paris Unfolded: 3D Miniature Cityscape on French Flag
translations.contentEn:
A silk ribbon unfurls diagonally across the canvas, twisting gently in mid-air. Within the folds of the ribbon exists a miniature sculpted city of [CITY], carved as a 3D bas-relief emerging from woven fabric textures.

Inside the ribbon: Landmarks, streets, and skyline rhythms of [CITY], flowing naturally with the ribbon's curvature, layered in subtle depth.

Style: Fabric realism fused with sculptural relief. Soft highlights, tactile folds, elegant poster design.

Color palette: Derived from the national flag of [COUNTRY], woven seamlessly into the fabric tones.
View & background: Top-down minimalist layout, off-white museum paper texture, strong negative space.

Typography: Title: "[CITY] UNFOLDED" Refined serif subtitle with poetic geographic language.

Composition rules: All architectural detail remains strictly inside the ribbon shape. Ultra-detailed, HDR, gallery-grade, 8K poster aesthetic.

translations.name: 雷神之手紧握闪电中的雪碧瓶
translations.content:
钢铁侠手套悬浮于可乐罐下方，电影感城市背景，戏剧性海报光线。--ar 7:9

 Hulk巨手悬于被压扁的百事可乐罐上方，烟雾缭绕的城市废墟，爆炸性动作电影风格。--ar 7:9

雷神发光之手紧握悬浮的雪碧瓶，闪电与雨水交织，背景雷神之锤，史诗海报风格。--ar 7:9

奇异博士施法，金色魔法光环中旋转的芬达瓶，神秘Sanctum背景，电影感光线。--ar 7:9
translations.nameEn: Thor's Hand Grips Electrified Sprite Bottle in Storm
translations.contentEn:
Iron Man's gauntlet hovering below a floating Coca-Cola can, cinematic city background, dramatic movie poster lighting. --ar 7:9

Hulk's giant hand hovering over a crushed Pepsi can embedded in pavement, smoky ruins, explosive action movie style. --ar 7:9

Thor's glowing hand holding a floating Sprite bottle amidst crackling lightning and rain, Mjolnir in background, epic poster style. --ar 7:9

Doctor Strange casting a spell under a spinning Fanta bottle inside a golden magic portal, mystical Sanctum background, cinematic lighting. --ar 7:9

translations.name: 舒适科学 | 2024概念家具广告
translations.content: 产品摄影创意：优质保健品瓶，配角为防拆封条、微型躺椅、警示标签贴纸。场景：干净工作室桌面。构图：居中、平静构图、高细节。光线：柔和定向工作室光线，强烈材质定义。
translations.nameEn: The Science of Comfort | Conceptual Furniture Ad 2024
translations.contentEn: Creative concept: Premium supplement bottle with tamper seal, tiny lounge chair, warning label sticker as secondary elements. Scene: Clean studio tabletop. Composition: Centered, calm framing, high detail. Lighting: Soft directional studio light, strong material definition.

translations.name: Bagel Labs活力橙色指甲油 - 美妆产品
translations.content: 超逼真编辑级美妆微距拍摄。一位女性将指甲油瓶极度贴近相机，戏剧性透视。瓶子是焦点（锐利清晰），面部在其后方柔和失焦。白色无缝背景。保持参考图的构图和手与产品的取景方式。
translations.nameEn: Vibrant Orange Nail Polish by Bagel Labs - Beauty Product
translations.contentEn: Ultra photoreal editorial beauty macro shot. A woman holds a nail polish bottle extremely close to the camera with dramatic perspective. The bottle is the main focus (tack sharp), while the face is softly out of focus behind it. White seamless background. Keep the same composition and hand-to-camera product framing as the reference image.

translations.name: 女性展示红色唇釉 | 美妆产品拍摄
translations.content:
超逼真美妆系列拍摄，纯白色无缝背景上的3x3网格拼贴。九个面板展示同一位模特：头发披散，丰盈光泽的长波浪深色头发。纤瘦健美身材，高级时尚感。皮肤明亮有真实纹理和精致修图。妆容：精致眉毛、干净眼线、柔和棕色腮红、大胆红色唇膏。

产品一致：光滑镀铬唇膏管和唇刷，管身清晰印有BAGEL品牌，粗体现代无衬线字体。管身形状、瓶盖、镀铬光泽和标签位置在所有面板中一致。BAGEL文字可读、拼写正确、居中对齐。

光线：高端美妆工作室光线，明亮均匀，镀铬包装上柔和镜面高光，真实阴影。
translations.nameEn: Woman Posing with Red Lip Gloss | Beauty Product Shoot
translations.contentEn:
Ultra-photoreal beauty campaign contact sheet on a pure white seamless background. A 3x3 grid collage of nine panels featuring ONE model with hair worn down: voluminous, glossy, long dark waves. The model has a lean, fit, runway-like physique and an attractive high-fashion look. Skin is luminous with realistic texture and refined editorial retouch. Makeup: defined brows, clean eyeliner, soft bronzy blush, and bold red lipstick.

Product must stay consistent: a sleek chrome lip product tube with the brand name BAGEL printed clearly. The tube shape, cap, chrome finish, and label placement remain consistent across all panels. BAGEL text must be readable, spelled correctly, centered, and aligned.

Lighting: high-end beauty studio lighting, bright and even, soft specular highlights on chrome packaging, realistic shadows.

translations.name: 超现实有机景观中的逼真芬达罐
translations.content: 超逼真电影产品摄影，光滑铝罐居中构图。罐身深午夜紫，饰有优雅葡萄串和绿叶插画，密集覆盖冰冷水珠。醒目标注「Midnight Spark – Bold & Juicy」高端字体。戏剧性对称皇冠形紫色葡萄汁从罐身后方猛烈爆发飞溅。工作室光线，高细节，8K，电影感，微距镜头聚焦罐身和水珠。
translations.nameEn: Photorealistic Coca-Cola Can in Surreal Organic Landscape
translations.contentEn: Hyper-realistic cinematic product photography of a sleek aluminum can, centered in the frame. The can is deep midnight purple, featuring elegant illustrations of grape clusters and green leaves, and is heavily covered in fresh, cold condensation droplets. Prominently labeled Midnight Spark – Bold & Juicy in premium typography. A dramatic, symmetrical crown-shaped splash of vivid purple grape juice erupts violently upward and outward from behind the can. Studio lighting, high detail, 8k resolution, cinematic, macro lens focus on the can and droplets.

translations.name: 香奈儿邂逅香水：奢侈产品摄影系列
translations.content:
高端商业摄影，粉色Nike运动鞋与银色蝴蝶结。产品（粉色Nike运动鞋）在所有画面中必须保持形状、比例、材质、颜色和品牌完全一致。超写实、电影感、精致、高端编辑广告风格。柔和工作室光线，微妙高光，真实阴影，超锐利焦点。每帧与背景干净分离。

3x3网格布局，从英雄静物到极致微距、动态交互、极简雕塑、漂浮元素、感官近景、色彩驱动、象征抽象到超现实融合。
translations.nameEn: Chanel Chance Perfume: Luxury Product Photography Collection
translations.contentEn:
High-end commercial photography featuring Pink Nike Sneaker and Silver Bow. The product must remain identical in shape, proportions, materials, colors, and branding across all frames. Hyperreal, cinematic, polished, high-end editorial advertising look. Soft studio lighting, subtle highlights, realistic shadows, ultra-sharp focus. Clean separation from background in every frame.

3x3 grid layout spanning from iconic hero still life to extreme macro detail, dynamic interaction, minimal sculptural scene, floating elements, sensory close-up, color-driven scene, symbolic abstraction, and surreal fusion.

translations.name: 复古Nomads.com互联网软件盒与CD-ROM
translations.content: 将{your website}变成一个带有CD-ROM的产品盒子，仿佛来自1995年。
translations.nameEn: Vintage Nomads.com Internet Software Box & CD-ROM
translations.contentEn: Turn {your website} into a product box with a CD-Rom as if it was from 1995.

translations.name: 午夜闪耀葡萄汽水罐：清爽产品摄影
translations.content: 超逼真奢华饮料产品摄影，光滑铝罐居中构图。罐身深午夜紫，饰有优雅葡萄串和绿叶插画，密集覆盖冰冷水珠。醒目标注「Midnight Spark – Bold & Juicy」高端字体。戏剧性对称皇冠形紫色葡萄汁从罐身后方猛烈爆发飞溅。工作室光线，高细节，8K，电影感，微距镜头聚焦罐身和水珠。
translations.nameEn: Midnight Spark Grape Soda Can: Refreshing Product Photo
translations.contentEn: Ultra-realistic luxury beverage product photography of a sleek aluminum can, centered in the frame. The can is deep midnight purple, featuring elegant illustrations of grape clusters and green leaves, heavily covered in fresh, cold condensation droplets. Prominently labeled Midnight Spark – Bold & Juicy in premium typography. A dramatic, symmetrical crown-shaped splash of vivid purple grape juice erupts violently upward from behind the can. Studio lighting, high detail, 8k resolution, cinematic, macro lens focus.

translations.name: 阿莫西林信息图：剂量、用途、副作用
translations.content:
一张关于[药物名称]的高质量科普信息海报。便当盒风格模块化网格布局，干净医疗UI/UX设计，清晰矩形卡片。顶部页眉醒目无衬线标题药物中文名称及化学通用名。顶部中央[药物剂型]超写实微距图片。角落[化学结构式]极简线条图。

各部分：环形图柱状图分析药理作用；极简图标适用症；用法用量矩阵；药代动力学时间轴；警示图标注意事项网格（需联网搜索）；适用人群画像；储存指南。

药物名称：奥司他韦胶囊
translations.nameEn: Amoxicillin Infographic: Dosage, Uses, Side Effects
translations.contentEn:
A high-quality infographic poster about [药物名称]. Bento-style modular grid layout, clean medical UI/UX design, clear rectangular cards. Top header with bold sans-serif title in Chinese and chemical/generic name. Top center with ultra-realistic macro image of [药物剂型]. Corner with minimal line drawing of [化学结构式].

Sections: Ring and bar charts for pharmacological action; minimal icons for indications; dosage matrix; pharmacokinetics timeline; warning icons for precautions (requires web search); applicable population icons; storage guide.

Drug name: Oseltamivir Capsule

translations.name: 雪景冬日中清爽草莓汁瓶
translations.content:
逼真广告拍摄：菠萝汁瓶在热带海滩，湿润沙滩，棕榈树和碧蓝海洋，波浪轻触瓶底，新鲜菠萝切片。NFC菠萝汁标签。

草莓汁瓶在覆雪山脉，雾气弥漫冷空气，草莓散落，温暖阳光穿透冰雾，柔和镜头光晕，粉红色调，电影近景。NFC草莓汁。

柑橘混合汁瓶在果园，切片柠檬青柠橙子水中飞溅，明亮阳光穿透树叶。NFC柑橘混合汁。

热带混合果汁瓶在阳光吊床，菠萝芒果橙子火龙果切片，度假氛围，鲜艳色彩，电影感阴影。NFC热带果汁。
translations.nameEn: Refreshing Strawberry Juice Bottle in Snowy Winter Scene
translations.contentEn:
Photorealistic advertising shots: Pineapple juice bottle on tropical beach, wet sand, palm trees and turquoise ocean, waves touching bottle base, fresh pineapple slices. NFC Pineapple Juice label.

Strawberry juice bottle on snow-covered mountains, misty cold air, strawberries scattered, warm sunlight through ice fog, soft lens flares, pink-red tones, cinematic close-up. NFC Strawberry Juice.

Citrus blend juice bottle in citrus grove, sliced lemon lime orange pieces splashing in water, bright sunlight through leaves. NFC Citrus Mix.

Tropical mixed juice bottle on sunlit hammock with ocean horizon, pineapple mango orange dragonfruit slices, vacation mood, vibrant colors, cinematic shadows. NFC Tropical Juice.

translations.name: 未来感Nike Air Force 1运动鞋与宇宙光芒
translations.content:
Nike Air Force运动鞋，深碳流星材质，边缘发光等离子线，土耳其蓝色，太空场景，靠近大规模小行星撞击，碎片爆发，电影爆炸效果。--ar 2:3

流星表面注入红热熔岩，裂纹中熔岩发光，鞋面鞋底脉络发光，深红橙色，虚空背景，燃烧崩塌小行星，火花射入虚空。--ar 2:3

黑色流星花岗岩雕刻鞋，熔融能量脉络，翡翠绿发光裂纹，小行星带中，明亮星光在远方增添宇宙光环，岩石碎片碰撞，慢动作。--ar 2:3

流星碎片鞋，橙色红色点缀，鞋底细节高光，广阔太空，爆炸效果，靠近周围岩石。--ar 2:3
translations.nameEn: Futuristic Nike Air Force 1 Sneaker with Cosmic Glow
translations.contentEn:
Nike Air Force sneaker, dark carbon meteorite material, glowing plasma threads along edges, Turquoise color, Space setting, near massive asteroid impact, fragments bursting outward, cinematic explosion effects. --ar 2:3

Meteorite surface infused with red-hot magma, glowing through cracks in surface, sole and upper veins, Red-hot and Orange colors, The void background, burning and crumbling asteroids, releasing sparks. --ar 2:3

Black meteorite granite carved shoe, molten energy veins, Emerald green glowing cracks, Among asteroid belts, bright starlight flares adding cosmic aura, shards colliding, Slow motion. --ar 2:3

Meteorite fragments shoe, Orange and Red accents, sole details and highlights, Vastness of space, explosion effect near surrounding rocks. --ar 2:3

translations.name: 发光透明3D渲染游戏与生活方式产品
translations.content: 超现代透明黑色超写实风格，流线型未来感、极简、漂浮设计、高光泽透明度。透明黑玻璃或聚合物材质，光滑曲面，高光泽内部部分反射。轮廓光和定向顶光，高强度，柔和漫射底光，锐利镜面高光和透明表面反射。深色光泽发光调。
translations.nameEn: Glowing Transparent 3D Render Gaming & Lifestyle Products
translations.contentEn: Ultra-modern transparent black hyperrealism, sleek futuristic minimalistic floating design with high-gloss transparency. Transparent black glass or polymer material, smooth curved surfaces, high-gloss with partial internal reflections. Rim light and directional top lighting, high intensity, soft diffuse glow underneath, sharp specular highlights across transparent surfaces. Dark glossy luminous tone.

translations.name: 可口可乐瓶产品摄影与冰飞溅
translations.content:
高端商业摄影，电影感，超逼真，奢华。激烈清爽感，高端活力，戏剧性。单瓶可口可乐玻璃瓶居中，极端凝结水珠沿玻璃流下，极其冰冷霜冻感。瓶内液体发光丰富琥珀色。

优雅飞溅液态冰块拱形环绕瓶子，而非遮挡。晶莹剔透锐利冰块在液态拱形中运动如钻石。细雾和气泡悬浮增强氛围。

戏剧性高对比电影光线（伦勃朗光线），温暖金色背光结合清爽冷调正面光，强调温度对比。深色大气桃花心木和琥珀渐变背景。微妙奢华焦外效果，无刺眼光线。
translations.nameEn: Coca-Cola Bottle Product Photography with Ice Splash
translations.contentEn:
High-end commercial photography, cinematic, hyper-realistic, luxurious. Intense refreshment, premium, energetic but controlled, dramatic. A single glass bottle of Coca-Cola, center-stage. Extreme condensation, real water droplets running down the glass, incredibly cold and frosty. The liquid inside glows with rich caramel amber light.

A dynamic, sculptural arch of liquid and ice cubes erupting around and behind the bottle, framing it elegantly. Crystal clear, sharp ice cubes caught in motion like diamonds. Fine mist and effervescent bubbles suspended in air.

Dramatic, high-contrast cinematic lighting (Rembrandt lighting), warm golden backlighting combined with cool, crisp key lighting on the front to emphasize temperature contrast. Deep, dark, atmospheric mahogany and amber gradient background. Subtle, luxurious bokeh effects.
